2351550.name: The Disasters​
2351550.description:
The Disasters

The world was once kept in balance by five demigods: Life, Death, Greed, Courage, and Desire.
They were created by the God of Creation to uphold order.

But over time, the Demigod of Desire became obsessed with power.
Desire corrupted the Demigod of Courage and together they brought down the rest.
The powers of the fallen demigods were passed on to those who served Desire.
Now, the world has collapsed into rot, greed, and chaos.

You are the Creator’s final hope.
A being untouched by desire.
You do not speak. You do not want.
You exist only to destroy and restore.

Key Features

Your gear is your class
There are no predefined roles.
Mix and match armor with distinct combat themes to define your playstyle.
Focus on one identity or blend multiple styles to create something new.

Carry two weapons, switch anytime
Equip two weapons and freely switch between them during combat.
Each weapon has its own stats, skill, and elemental type.
Your weapon setup determines your rhythm and strategy.

Make deals with the Demigod of Desire
Desire will sometimes offer you powerful gear.
In return, you’ll face serious gameplay restrictions.
You’re free to refuse — but the temptation is always there.

Boss fights that test your mind
Each chapter features a main boss with unique mechanics and patterns.
Learn their behaviors and defeat them with skill and timing.

Midbosses that test your reflexes
Midbosses are fast and direct.
They push your reactions, movement, and control to the limit.
Sometimes, they’re scarier than the final boss.

Elemental ultimates with invincibility
Build up elemental energy and unleash powerful ultimates.
These abilities grant a brief invincibility window and can break enemy patterns if timed right.

Pray for blessings
When things get difficult, you can pray to the Creator for divine blessings.
Some offer permanent upgrades, others activate under specific conditions.

Customize your hub
Earn trophies, decorations, and structures by unlocking achievements.
Decorate your lobby and leave your mark between runs.
